title: Pinalia lindleyi
taxonomy: Pinalia lindleyi is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification is due to the plant's characteristics and its botanical affinity with other orchids. The genus Pinalia belongs to the subtribe Aeridinae, which is a subgroup of the orchid family. Pinalia lindleyi is further classified into the tribe Epidendreae, which comprises a diverse group of orchids. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and plant diversity within the orchid family.
uses: Pinalia lindleyi is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine practices. Its extracts have been studied for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
